issues.description: Two separate KO actions with different cost thresholds should be represented as a single action with multiple targets or clarified as independent choices. Current DSL executes both sequentially; the card text suggests up to 1 of each category (two separate K.O.s, not two independent selections from the same pool).

Second KO action targets characters with cost ≤2, but first action already includes cost ≤2 characters. This creates ambiguity: can the same character be targeted twice, or should the second action exclude characters already targeted? Card text '1 with cost 3 or less AND 1 with cost 2 or less' implies distinct selections, likely needing exclusion logic or clarification that cost 2 characters can only be K.O.'d once.
